title: Canara Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Canara Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
